channel.title: Dayton Headlines Feed
channel.description: Daily top 6 headlines from Dayton, OH media

item.title: Officers searching for suspect after morning pursuit - WDTN.com
item.description: Officers searching for suspect after morning pursuit WDTN.com Source: WDTN

item.title: ‘Ohio’s Largest Playground’ pays off: Record 14M tourists inject $1.74B into Warren County - Dayton Daily News
item.description: ‘Ohio’s Largest Playground’ pays off: Record 14M tourists inject $1.74B into Warren County Dayton Daily News Source: Dayton Daily News

item.title: Dublin City Schools unveil final redistricting maps following months of debate - WKEF
item.description: Dublin City Schools unveil final redistricting maps following months of debate WKEF Source: ABC22/FOX45 (Dayton24/7Now)

item.title: CPD costs to protect mayor, city council soar as police burn through overtime - WKEF
item.description: CPD costs to protect mayor, city council soar as police burn through overtime WKEF Source: ABC22/FOX45 (Dayton24/7Now)

item.title: Full ‘strawberry moon’ visible tonight - Dayton Daily News
item.description: Full ‘strawberry moon’ visible tonight Dayton Daily News Source: Dayton Daily News

item.title: Appeals court overturns sentences for Angela, Jake Wagner in Pike County Massacre - WKEF
item.description: Appeals court overturns sentences for Angela, Jake Wagner in Pike County Massacre WKEF Source: ABC22/FOX45 (Dayton24/7Now)
